title: [Brayern Isle, Beach]
description: The island rises above you.  Against the electric blue haze of the mana storm is a mountainous spire lined with palms and thick vegetation.  The shoreline is a mix of ebon-hued volcanic stones and displaced boulders that have slid down the mountain over the years.  Off of the bridge to the docks is a prominent stone statue with an accompanying wood and stone sign.  Twin lantern-lined paths lead down the beach in either direction.
